source_pr.title: planner, tests: migrate more tests to IT
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #47352

Migrate more tests from `planner` to `tests/integrationtest`. After merging this PR, only the `plan_cache` and `plan_cacheable` tests are left.

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [x] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

symptoms: +// `SELECT t0.c1, t0.c2 FROM t0 GROUP BY MOD(t0.c0, DEFAULT(t0.c2));` is unstable.
failure_signature: +// `SELECT t0.c1, t0.c2 FROM t0 GROUP BY MOD(t0.c0, DEFAULT(t0.c2));` is unstable.
fix_pattern: +// `SELECT t0.c1, t0.c2 FROM t0 GROUP BY MOD(t0.c0, DEFAULT(t0.c2));` is unstable.

evidence: evidence: +// `SELECT t0.c1, t0.c2 FROM t0 GROUP BY MOD(t0.c0, DEFAULT(t0.c2));` is unstable.
